title: Frontmatter-Ledger Coherence Reconciliation Receipt
description: Receipt emitted by the frontmatter-ledger-coherence chore (ADR-0.0.16 OBPI-03) on every invocation. Records the ledger cursor sampled at run-start, every frontmatter file rewritten with per-field before/after diffs, and any pool ADRs skipped. Validates against this schema before being written to disk.

ledger_cursor.description: Stable identifier of the ledger state sampled at run-start. Format: 'sha256:<64 hex>' over the raw bytes of .gzkit/ledger.jsonl at the moment the Ledger instance was opened.

run_started_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp recorded at reconcile_frontmatter() entry.

run_completed_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp recorded at reconcile_frontmatter() exit (normal path).

files_rewritten.description: One entry per non-pool file whose governed frontmatter fields were (or would have been, under --dry-run) rewritten to match the ledger. Empty array when there is no drift.

path.description: Path to the ADR or OBPI file relative to the project root.

diffs.description: Non-empty list of per-field diffs for this file.

before.description: Frontmatter value observed before the rewrite.

after.description: Ledger value written in place of the frontmatter value (ledger-wins).

skipped.description: Files deliberately not considered for reconciliation. The only current reason is 'pool-adr' (pool ADRs have no ledger entry by design).

path.description: Path to the skipped file relative to the project root.

reason.description: Reason the file was skipped. Extensible enum; pool-adr is the only value emitted today.

dry_run.description: True when the reconciler was invoked with --dry-run (no filesystem writes to ADR/OBPI files). The receipt itself is still written to disk in both modes.
